name: ComboboxPopover
description: Add combobox dropdown to any button element
searchText: comboboxpopover add combobox dropdown to any button element @mantine/core /core/combobox-popover allowdeselect checkiconposition children comboboxprops data defaultdropdownopened defaultsearchvalue defaultvalue dropdownopened filter form hiddeninputprops hiddeninputvaluesdivider limit maxdropdownheight multiple name nothingfoundmessage onchange ondropdownclose ondropdownopen onoptionsubmit onsearchchange renderoption scrollareaprops searchvalue searchable selectfirstoptionondropdownopen value withalignedlabels withcheckicon withscrollarea

props.name: allowDeselect
props.description: Allows deselecting the selected option by clicking it (only for single mode)

props.name: checkIconPosition
props.description: Position of the check icon relative to the option label

props.name: children
props.description: Content of the component

props.name: comboboxProps
props.description: Props passed down to Combobox component

props.name: data
props.description: Data used to generate options

props.name: defaultDropdownOpened
props.description: Uncontrolled dropdown initial opened state

props.name: defaultSearchValue
props.description: Default search value

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: dropdownOpened
props.description: Controlled dropdown opened state

props.name: filter
props.description: Function based on which items are filtered and sorted

props.name: form
props.description: Hidden input form for form submission

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to the hidden input

props.name: hiddenInputValuesDivider
props.description: Divider used to separate values in the hidden input value attribute

props.name: limit
props.description: Maximum number of options displayed at a time

props.name: maxDropdownHeight
props.description: max-height of the dropdown

props.name: multiple
props.description: If set, multiple items can be selected at the same time

props.name: name
props.description: Hidden input name for form submission

props.name: nothingFoundMessage
props.description: Message displayed when no options match the search query or when there is no data

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: onDropdownClose
props.description: Called when dropdown closes

props.name: onDropdownOpen
props.description: Called when dropdown opens

props.name: onOptionSubmit
props.description: Called when option is submitted from dropdown with mouse click or Enter key

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called when search changes

props.name: renderOption
props.description: A function to render content of the option, replaces the default content of the option

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to the underlying ScrollArea component in the dropdown

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Controlled search value

props.name: searchable
props.description: Allows searching through options

props.name: selectFirstOptionOnDropdownOpen
props.description: If set, the first option is selected when dropdown opens

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled component value

props.name: withAlignedLabels
props.description: Aligns unchecked labels with the checked one

props.name: withCheckIcon
props.description: Displays check icon near the selected option label

props.name: withScrollArea
props.description: Determines whether the options should be wrapped with ScrollArea.AutoSize
